name: serverkit-analytics
description: Privacy-first, self-hosted web analytics for the sites this panel manages. A lightweight (<4 KB) cookieless JavaScript tracker and optional server-log ingestion feed a persistent time series stored on your own server, and nothing leaves the box. Visitor identity is a daily-rotating salted hash of IP+user-agent (raw IPs are never stored), DoNotTrack is honored, and there are no cookies, fingerprinting, or third-party calls. A real dashboard inside the panel shows visitors, pageviews, top pages, referrers, devices, and a live realtime counter, with one-click wiring into managed WordPress and nginx-proxied apps.
author: ServerKit

raw_retention_days.title: Raw event retention (days)
raw_retention_days.description: How long individual pageview/event rows are kept before pruning. Rollups outlive this.

rollup_retention_months.title: Rollup retention (months)
rollup_retention_months.description: How long the daily rollup time series is kept.

honor_dnt.title: Honor Do Not Track
honor_dnt.description: Drop hits from browsers sending the DNT header (server-side double-check; the tracker also honors it).

geo_enabled.title: Country geolocation
geo_enabled.description: Fill a country column from a local GeoLite2-Country MMDB. Off by default; no database ships with the panel.

geo_db_path.title: GeoLite2 MMDB path
geo_db_path.description: Absolute path to a GeoLite2-Country.mmdb file on the panel host. Country stays null when empty or missing.

collect_rate_per_min.title: Collect rate limit (per minute)
collect_rate_per_min.description: Token-bucket cap on collect hits per site-key and per client IP.

buffer_flush_seconds.title: Buffer flush interval (seconds)
buffer_flush_seconds.description: How often the in-memory event buffer is flushed to the database.

buffer_max.title: Buffer flush size
buffer_max.description: Flush the buffer early once this many events have accumulated.

store_query_strings.title: Store query strings
store_query_strings.description: Persist the query part of URLs. Off by default to avoid capturing tokens/PII in URLs.

log_ingestion_enabled.title: Server-log ingestion
log_ingestion_enabled.description: Allow the scheduled log-tail job to ingest access logs for sites that opt in.
